heading: Learn More
body:
- To learn how to define a MongoDB Search index to meet your
  MongoDB Search query needs, see [Search Tester](atlas-search-queries).

- To learn how to create a MongoDB Search index, see [Create a MongoDB Search index](create-fts-index).

- To learn more about the MongoDB Search index configurations described in this
  tutorial, see the following reference pages:

  - [Process Data with Analyzers](analyzers-ref)

  - [Define Field Mappings](fts-field-mappings)

  - [storedSource](fts-stored-source-definition)

  - [Synonym](synonyms-ref)

- For hands-on experience creating MongoDB Search indexes for the sample
  datasets and running MongoDB Search queries against the indexed
  data, try the [index builder](fts-tutorial-ref).

- For a conceptual overview of how to define an index to meet your query
  preferences, see [Define Your Index](fts-define-index).
